title: Update footer with smaller font size and black text color

requirements.summary: Reduce the font size of the footer text to make it more subtle and less prominent
acceptanceCriteria: Footer text font size is reduced from current size
Text remains readable but more subtle
Font size change is applied to the Footer component

file_operations.description: Reduce the font size of the footer text 'Built And Managed By TixtedEdits' by applying a smaller text size class (e.g., text-xs or text-sm) to make it more subtle while maintaining readability

requirements.summary: Change the footer text color to solid black instead of the current gradient styling
acceptanceCriteria: Footer text displays in solid black color
Text color is applied consistently across light and dark themes

file_operations.description: Replace the current gradient text styling with solid black color (#000000) by removing gradient classes and applying text-black or equivalent solid color class. Ensure the color works consistently in both light and dark themes

requirements.summary: Maintain the modern clean font family currently applied to the footer text
acceptanceCriteria: Footer continues using the modern clean font family
No change to font family, only size and color are modified

file_operations.description: Verify that the existing modern clean font family (Inter, Poppins, or Montserrat) remains applied to the footer text while making the size and color changes. Do not modify or remove any font-family related classes or styling
